artifacts.title: Know receipt from 2025-08-26
artifacts.excerpt:
My founder stages

2023: understanding *the world* so I know what I *should* work on

2024: understanding *my values* so I know what I *want* to work on

2025: looking for ALIVENESS IN MY SOUL so I know when THE UNIVERSE IS CALLING ME TO A DANCE OF DIVINE CREATION AND GLORY

How do you use Twitter so that it's not at all bad for you? Scrolling *feels bad* a lot of the time, but there's little benefit if I *never* read what others post...
